title: codonoboea longipes
intro: Codonoboea longipes, also known as the creeping Codonoboea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Codonoboea longipes is typically dried and used as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea, or sometimes mixed with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
